description: HP/Agilent 54622A/54622D and 5462x-family mixed-signal/analog oscilloscope. Programmed via SCPI over GPIB/RS-232. The 546xxA models are analog-only; the 546xxD models add 16 digital channels (DIGital/POD subsystems). Command set is shared across the 54620/54621/54622/54624 series.

identity.description: Returns AGILENT TECHNOLOGIES,<model>,<serial number>,<software revision>. The model field identifies the specific 5462x instrument.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clears all status and error registers, the status byte, and the error queue.

commands.name: define_macro
commands.description: Defines a macro by assigning a sequence of commands (block data) to a macro label. No query form.

commands.name: enable_macro
commands.description: Enables (1) or disables (0) expansion of macros.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Standard Event Status Enable Register mask (bits: PON, URQ, CME, EXE, DDE, QYE, TRG, OPC).

commands.name: event_status_register_query
commands.description: Reads and clears the Standard Event Status Register.

commands.name: get_macro_contents_query
commands.description: Returns the definition of the named macro as block data.

parameters.name: macro label
parameters.range: quoted ASCII string; returns block data in IEEE 488.2 # format

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Returns the instrument identification: AGILENT TECHNOLOGIES,<model>,<serial number>,<software revision>.

commands.name: learn_macro_query
commands.description: Returns a comma-separated list of all currently defined macro labels.

commands.name: learn_query
commands.description: Returns the current instrument setup as a block of data in IEEE 488.2 # format.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Sets the OPC bit (set form) and the query places an ASCII 1 in the output queue when all pending device operations are complete.

commands.name: option_query
commands.description: Returns installed module/option information in the form n,A.XX.XX.

commands.name: purge_macros
commands.description: Purges (deletes) all currently defined macros. No query form.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Recalls a previously saved instrument setup from the specified register. No query form.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the instrument to its default state. No query form.

commands.name: save
commands.description: Saves the current instrument setup to the specified register. No query form.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Service Request Enable Register mask (bits: OPER, ESB, MAV, MSG, USR, TRG).

commands.name: status_byte_query
commands.description: Reads the Status Byte register (bits: OPER, RQS/MSS, ESB, MAV, MSG, USR, TRG).

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Triggers the instrument (group execute trigger equivalent). No query form.

commands.name: self_test_query
commands.description: Performs a self-test and returns 0 for pass or a non-zero value for failure.

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Waits until all pending operations complete before executing further commands. No query form.

commands.name: activity_query
commands.description: Returns activity (edges and logical highs/lows) on the channels. Returns <edges>,<levels> as 32-bit integers.

commands.name: all_event_register_query
commands.description: Queries the all-event (auto-trigger) register, returning 0 or 1.

commands.name: autoscale
commands.description: Automatically configures vertical, horizontal, and trigger settings for the active input signals. No query form.

commands.name: blank
commands.description: Turns off (blanks) the display of the specified source. No query form.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | POD{1|2} | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: clear_display
commands.description: Clears the display and resets all associated measurements. No query form.

commands.name: digitize
commands.description: Acquires waveform data for the specified sources into the waveform record. No query form.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | POD1 | POD2 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; up to 5 sources; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: erase
commands.description: Erases the screen / pixel memory. No query form.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merges the current display into the specified pixel memory. No query form.

commands.name: operation_status_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Operation Status Enable register.

commands.name: operation_status_query
commands.description: Queries the Operation Status Event register.

commands.name: overload_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the overload protection enable register (54640-series only). Bits: External Trigger, Channel 4..1.

commands.name: overload_register_query
commands.description: Queries the overload event register (54640-series only).

commands.name: print
commands.description: Outputs a copy of the screen to a hardcopy/print device. The query form returns formatted print data.

parameters.name: parameter
parameters.range: {HIRes | LORes | TIFF | PCL | BMP | PARallel | DISK | FACTors | NOFactors}; up to 5 times

commands.name: run
commands.description: Starts repetitive acquisitions. No query form.

commands.name: serial_query
commands.description: Returns the instrument serial number as an unquoted string.

commands.name: single
commands.description: Acquires a single trigger of data. No query form.

commands.name: status_query
commands.description: Returns whether the specified display source is on (1) or off (0).

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stops acquisitions. No query form.

commands.name: trigger_event_register_query
commands.description: Queries the Trigger Event Register, returning 0 or 1.

commands.name: view
commands.description: Turns on (displays) the specified source. No query form.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | PMEMory{0|1|2} | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | PMEMory{0|1|2} | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: acquire_complete
commands.description: Sets/queries the completion criterion (percent of time buckets that must be full). Value is 100.

commands.name: acquire_count
commands.description: Sets/queries the number of values averaged in AVERage acquisition mode.

commands.name: acquire_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the acquisition sampling mode: real-time or equivalent-time.

commands.name: acquire_points_query
commands.description: Returns the number of data points the hardware acquires (2000).

commands.name: acquire_sample_rate_query
commands.description: Returns the current acquisition sample rate in samples per second.

commands.name: acquire_type
commands.description: Sets/queries the acquisition type: normal, averaging, or peak detect.

commands.name: calibrate_date_query
commands.description: Returns the calibration date as <day>,<month>,<year>.

commands.name: calibrate_label
commands.description: Sets/queries the calibration label string.

parameters.name: string
parameters.range: quoted ASCII string up to 32 characters

commands.name: calibrate_switch_query
commands.description: Returns the state of the calibration protect switch.

commands.name: calibrate_time_query
commands.description: Returns the calibration time as <hours>,<minutes>,<seconds>.

commands.name: channel_bwlimit
commands.description: Turns the bandwidth limit filter on/off for the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_coupling
commands.description: Sets/queries the input coupling for the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_display
commands.description: Turns the display of the specified channel on/off.

commands.name: channel_impedance
commands.description: Sets/queries the input impedance for the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_invert
commands.description: Inverts the specified channel relative to ground or offset.

commands.name: channel_label
commands.description: Sets/queries the label string for the specified channel.

parameters.name: string
parameters.range: up to 6 ASCII characters in quotation marks

commands.name: channel_offset
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical offset of the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_probe
commands.description: Sets/queries the probe attenuation ratio for the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_probe_skew
commands.description: Sets/queries the channel-to-channel skew adjustment (54640-series only).

commands.name: channel_protection
commands.description: Clears (set form, [:CLEAR]) the input protection trip and queries the protection state (54640-series only).

commands.name: channel_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical full-scale range of the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_scale
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical units per division of the specified channel.

commands.name: channel_units
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical measurement units for the specified channel.

commands.name: digital_display
commands.description: Turns the display of the specified digital channel on/off (546xxD only).

commands.name: digital_label
commands.description: Sets/queries the label string for the specified digital channel (546xxD only).

parameters.name: string
parameters.range: up to 6 ASCII characters in quotation marks

commands.name: digital_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the on-screen position of the specified digital channel (546xxD only).

commands.name: digital_threshold
commands.description: Sets/queries the logic threshold for the specified digital channel (546xxD only).

commands.name: display_clear
commands.description: Clears the display. No query form.

commands.name: display_data
commands.description: Writes (command) or reads (query) screen image data. Command supports TIFF format / GRATicule area; query supports TIFF or BMP and GRATicule or SCReen area.

commands.name: display_label
commands.description: Turns the analog/digital channel labels on/off.

commands.name: display_label_list
commands.description: Sets/queries the label list as a time-ordered list of up to 75 labels (binary block).

parameters.name: binary block
parameters.range: time-ordered list of 75 labels, each max 6 characters followed by a comma

commands.name: display_persistence
commands.description: Sets/queries the waveform persistence.

commands.name: display_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the pixel memory source displayed.

commands.name: display_vectors
commands.description: Turns vector (connect-the-dots) display on/off.

commands.name: external_bwlimit
commands.description: Sets/queries the bandwidth limit of the external trigger input.

commands.name: external_impedance
commands.description: Sets/queries the input impedance of the external trigger input.

commands.name: external_probe
commands.description: Sets/queries the probe attenuation ratio of the external trigger input.

commands.name: external_protection
commands.description: Clears (set form, [:CLEAR]) the external input protection trip and queries the protection state.

commands.name: external_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical full-scale range of the external trigger input.

commands.name: external_units
commands.description: Sets/queries the measurement units of the external trigger input.

commands.name: function_center
commands.description: Sets/queries the FFT center frequency.

commands.name: function_display
commands.description: Turns the math function display on/off.

commands.name: function_offset
commands.description: Sets/queries the value at center screen for the selected function.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.range: value at center screen (NR3); +/-10x current sensitivity

commands.name: function_operation
commands.description: Sets/queries the math operation performed.

commands.name: function_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the full-scale vertical axis value of the selected function. Range depends on the operation.

parameters.name: range
parameters.range: full-scale vertical value (NR3); ADD/SUBT/MULT 8E-6..800E+3; INTegrate 8E-9..400E+3; DIFFerentiate 80E-3..8.0E12; FFT 8..800 dBV

commands.name: function_reference
commands.description: Sets/queries the FFT reference level.

commands.name: function_scale
commands.description: Sets/queries the vertical units per division of the selected function.

commands.name: function_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the input source for the math function.

commands.name: function_span
commands.description: Sets/queries the FFT frequency span.

commands.name: function_window
commands.description: Sets/queries the FFT windowing function.

commands.name: hardcopy_destination
commands.description: Sets/queries the hardcopy output destination.

commands.name: hardcopy_factors
commands.description: Turns the printing of instrument settings (factors) on/off.

commands.name: hardcopy_form_feed
commands.description: Turns the form feed at the end of a hardcopy on/off.

commands.name: hardcopy_format
commands.description: Sets/queries the hardcopy device format.

parameters.name: format
parameters.range: {TIFF | BMP | CSV | LASerjet | DESKjet | EPSon | SEIKo}

commands.name: hardcopy_grayscale
commands.description: Turns grayscale hardcopy output on/off.

commands.name: marker_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the marker (cursor) mode.

commands.name: marker_x1_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the X1 cursor position.

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.range: {s | ms | us | ns | ps | Hz | kHz | MHz}

commands.name: marker_x1y1_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the source for the X1/Y1 cursors.

commands.name: marker_x2_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the X2 cursor position.

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.range: {s | ms | us | ns | ps | Hz | kHz | MHz}

commands.name: marker_x2y2_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the source for the X2/Y2 cursors.

commands.name: marker_x_delta_query
commands.description: Returns the delta between the X1 and X2 cursors.

commands.name: marker_y1_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the Y1 cursor position.

commands.name: marker_y2_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the Y2 cursor position.

commands.name: marker_y_delta_query
commands.description: Returns the delta between the Y1 and Y2 cursors.

commands.name: measure_clear
commands.description: Clears all selected measurements from the display. No query form.

commands.name: measure_counter
commands.description: Measures/queries the counter frequency for the specified source.

commands.name: measure_define
commands.description: Defines measurement parameters for DELay (edge specs) or THResholds.

commands.name: measure_delay
commands.description: Measures/queries the delay between two sources.

commands.name: measure_duty_cycle
commands.description: Measures/queries the duty cycle (ratio of positive pulse width to period).

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

parameters.name: return_value
parameters.range: ratio of positive pulse width to period (NR3)

commands.name: measure_fall_time
commands.description: Measures/queries the fall time of the selected source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

parameters.name: return_value
parameters.range: time between lower and upper thresholds (NR3)

commands.name: measure_frequency
commands.description: Measures/queries the frequency of the selected source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_negative_width
commands.description: Measures/queries the negative pulse width of the selected source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_overshoot
commands.description: Measures/queries the overshoot of the selected source as a percent.

commands.name: measure_period
commands.description: Measures/queries the period of the selected source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_phase
commands.description: Measures/queries the phase angle between two sources.

commands.name: measure_preshoot
commands.description: Measures/queries the preshoot of the selected source as a percent.

commands.name: measure_positive_width
commands.description: Measures/queries the positive pulse width of the selected source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_rise_time
commands.description: Measures/queries the rise time of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_show
commands.description: Enables markers showing where the measurement is being made.

commands.name: measure_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the source(s) for subsequent measurements.

parameters.name: source1,2
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_time_edge
commands.description: Measures/queries the time of a specified edge (transition) relative to the trigger.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_time_value_query
commands.description: Returns the time at which the waveform crosses a specified voltage value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.range: voltage level the waveform must cross

parameters.name: slope
parameters.range: direction of the waveform when <value> is crossed

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_vamplitude
commands.description: Measures/queries the amplitude (Vtop - Vbase) of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vaverage
commands.description: Measures/queries the average voltage of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vbase
commands.description: Measures/queries the base voltage of the selected source.

parameters.name: base_voltage
parameters.range: voltage at the base of the waveform (NR3)

commands.name: measure_vmax
commands.description: Measures/queries the maximum voltage of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vmin
commands.description: Measures/queries the minimum voltage of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vpp
commands.description: Measures/queries the peak-to-peak voltage of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vrms
commands.description: Measures/queries the DC RMS voltage of the selected source.

commands.name: measure_vtime_query
commands.description: Returns the voltage at a specified time from the trigger.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | FUNCtion | MATH} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: measure_vtop
commands.description: Measures/queries the top voltage of the selected source.

parameters.name: return_value
parameters.range: voltage at the top of the waveform (NR3)

commands.name: measure_xmax
commands.description: Measures/queries the horizontal value at the waveform maximum.

commands.name: measure_xmin
commands.description: Measures/queries the horizontal value at the waveform minimum.

commands.name: pod_display
commands.description: Turns the display of the specified digital pod on/off (546xxD only).

commands.name: pod_threshold
commands.description: Sets/queries the logic threshold for the specified digital pod (546xxD only).

commands.name: system_date
commands.description: Sets/queries the instrument real-time-clock date.

commands.name: system_display
commands.description: Writes a quoted string to the instrument display. No query form.

parameters.name: string
parameters.range: up to 254 characters as a quoted ASCII string

commands.name: system_error_query
commands.description: Reads and removes the next error from the error queue, returning code and message.

commands.name: system_lock
commands.description: Locks/unlocks (or queries) the front panel.

commands.name: system_setup
commands.description: Sets (load) or queries (store) the complete instrument setup as block data.

commands.name: system_time
commands.description: Sets/queries the instrument real-time-clock time.

commands.name: timebase_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the horizontal time base mode.

commands.name: timebase_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the horizontal position (time from trigger to the display reference point).

parameters.name: pos
parameters.range: time from trigger event to display reference point (NR3)

commands.name: timebase_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the full-scale horizontal time (10 divisions).

parameters.name: range_value
parameters.range: 50 ns to 500 s (54620-series); 10 ns to 500 s (54640-series) (NR3)

commands.name: timebase_reference
commands.description: Sets/queries the horizontal time reference position on the display.

commands.name: timebase_scale
commands.description: Sets/queries the horizontal time per division.

commands.name: timebase_window_position
commands.description: Sets/queries the delayed (window) view horizontal position.

parameters.name: pos
parameters.range: time from trigger event to delayed view reference point (NR3)

commands.name: timebase_window_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the full-scale horizontal time for the delayed window.

parameters.name: range_value
parameters.range: range value in seconds for the delayed window (NR3)

commands.name: timebase_window_scale
commands.description: Sets/queries the time per division for the delayed window.

parameters.name: scale_value
parameters.range: scale value in seconds for the delayed window (NR3)

commands.name: trigger_can_acknowledge
commands.description: Sets/queries CAN acknowledge (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

commands.name: trigger_can_pattern_data
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN data pattern and mask (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

parameters.name: mask
parameters.range: integer or <string>; string ::= "0xnn..n" hex, #Hnn..n hex, or #Bnn..n binary

commands.name: trigger_can_pattern_data_length
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN data pattern length in bytes (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

commands.name: trigger_can_pattern_id
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN ID pattern and mask (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

parameters.name: mask
parameters.range: integer or <string>; string ::= "0xnn..n" hex, #Hnn..n hex, or #Bnn..n binary

commands.name: trigger_can_pattern_id_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN ID addressing mode (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

commands.name: trigger_can_sample_point
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN sample point percentage (requires N2758A CAN Trigger module).

commands.name: trigger_can_signal_baudrate
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN signal baud rate.

commands.name: trigger_can_signal_definition
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN signal definition (which signal line).

commands.name: trigger_can_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN trigger source.

commands.name: trigger_can_trigger
commands.description: Sets/queries the CAN trigger condition.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.range: {SOF} without module; {SOF | DATA | ERRor | IDData | IDEither | IDRemote} with N2758A CAN Trigger module

commands.name: trigger_duration_greater_than
commands.description: Sets/queries the minimum duration for a duration (greater-than) trigger.

commands.name: trigger_duration_less_than
commands.description: Sets/queries the maximum duration for a duration (less-than) trigger.

commands.name: trigger_duration_pattern
commands.description: Sets/queries the channel pattern for a duration trigger.

commands.name: trigger_duration_qualifier
commands.description: Sets/queries the duration trigger qualifier.

commands.name: trigger_duration_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the duration trigger min/max time range.

commands.name: trigger_edge_coupling
commands.description: Sets/queries the edge trigger coupling.

commands.name: trigger_edge_level
commands.description: Sets/queries the edge trigger level for the specified source.

parameters.name: level
parameters.range: internal: .75 x full-scale from center (NR3); external: 2 V at 1:1; digital (546xxD): 8 V

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | EXTernal} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | EXTernal} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: trigger_edge_reject
commands.description: Sets/queries the edge trigger reject filter.

commands.name: trigger_edge_slope
commands.description: Sets/queries the edge trigger slope.

commands.name: trigger_edge_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the edge trigger source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.range: {CHANnel<n> | EXTernal} for 546xxA; {CHANnel<n> | DIGital0..DIGital15 | EXTernal} for 546xxD; <n> ::= 1-2 or 1-4

commands.name: trigger_glitch_greater_than
commands.description: Sets/queries the minimum pulse width for a glitch (greater-than) trigger.

commands.name: trigger_glitch_less_than
commands.description: Sets/queries the maximum pulse width for a glitch (less-than) trigger.

commands.name: trigger_glitch_level
commands.description: Sets/queries the glitch trigger level for the specified source.

parameters.name: level
parameters.range: internal: .75 x full-scale from center (NR3); external: 2 V at 1:1; digital (546xxD): 6 V

commands.name: trigger_glitch_polarity
commands.description: Sets/queries the glitch trigger polarity.

commands.name: trigger_glitch_qualifier
commands.description: Sets/queries the glitch trigger qualifier.

commands.name: trigger_glitch_range
commands.description: Sets/queries the glitch trigger pulse width range.

commands.name: trigger_glitch_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the glitch trigger source.

commands.name: trigger_hf_reject
commands.description: Turns the high-frequency reject filter on/off.

commands.name: trigger_holdoff
commands.description: Sets/queries the trigger holdoff time.

commands.name: trigger_iic_pattern_address
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C address pattern.

commands.name: trigger_iic_pattern_data
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C data pattern.

commands.name: trigger_iic_source_clock
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C clock (SCL) source.

commands.name: trigger_iic_source_data
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C data (SDA) source.

commands.name: trigger_iic_trigger_qualifier
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C trigger qualifier (for read/write data comparisons).

commands.name: trigger_iic_trigger_type
commands.description: Sets/queries the I2C trigger type.

parameters.name: type
parameters.range: {STARt | STOP | READ7 | READEeprom | WRITe7 | WRITe10 | NACK | RESTart}

commands.name: trigger_lin_signal_baudrate
commands.description: Sets/queries the LIN signal baud rate.

commands.name: trigger_lin_signal_definition
commands.description: Sets/queries the LIN signal definition.

commands.name: trigger_lin_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the LIN trigger source.

commands.name: trigger_lin_trigger
commands.description: Sets/queries the LIN trigger condition.

commands.name: trigger_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the trigger mode (trigger type).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.range: {EDGE | GLITch | PATTern | CAN | DURation | IIC | SEQuence | SPI | TV | USB}; query returns NONE if TIMebase:MODE is ROLL or XY

commands.name: trigger_noise_reject
commands.description: Turns the trigger noise reject (hysteresis) on/off.

commands.name: trigger_pattern
commands.description: Sets/queries the channel pattern (and optional edge) for a pattern trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_count
commands.description: Sets/queries the count value for the sequence (advanced) trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_edge
commands.description: Sets/queries the source and slope for edge resource 1 or 2 of the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_find
commands.description: Sets/queries the 'find' stage resource and operator for the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_pattern
commands.description: Sets/queries the pattern and mask for pattern resource 1 or 2 of the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_reset
commands.description: Sets/queries the reset-stage resource and operator for the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_timer
commands.description: Sets/queries the timer value for the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_sequence_trigger
commands.description: Sets/queries the trigger-stage resource and operator for the sequence trigger.

commands.name: trigger_spi_clock_slope
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI clock slope.

commands.name: trigger_spi_clock_timeout
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI clock timeout used for framing.

commands.name: trigger_spi_framing
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI framing method.

commands.name: trigger_spi_pattern_data
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI data pattern and mask.

commands.name: trigger_spi_pattern_width
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI data pattern width in bits.

commands.name: trigger_spi_source_clock
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI clock source.

commands.name: trigger_spi_source_data
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI data source.

commands.name: trigger_spi_source_frame
commands.description: Sets/queries the SPI frame (chip-select) source.

commands.name: trigger_sweep
commands.description: Sets/queries the trigger sweep mode.

commands.name: trigger_tv_line
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger line number.

commands.name: trigger_tv_mode
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger mode.

parameters.name: tv mode
parameters.range: {Field<n> | ALLFields | LINE | ALLLines | LINEField<n> | LINEAlt | LINEVert}; <n> ::= 1-2

commands.name: trigger_tv_polarity
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger sync polarity.

commands.name: trigger_tv_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger source.

commands.name: trigger_tv_standard
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger video standard.

commands.name: trigger_tv_tvmode
commands.description: Sets/queries the TV trigger mode (alternate TVMODE form).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.range: {Field<n> | ALLFields | LINE | ALLLines | LINEField<n> | LINEAlt | LINEVert}; <n> ::= 1-2

commands.name: trigger_usb_source_dminus
commands.description: Sets/queries the USB D- source.

commands.name: trigger_usb_source_dplus
commands.description: Sets/queries the USB D+ source.

commands.name: trigger_usb_speed
commands.description: Sets/queries the USB bus speed.

commands.name: trigger_usb_trigger
commands.description: Sets/queries the USB trigger condition.

commands.name: waveform_byte_order
commands.description: Sets/queries the byte order for WORD-format waveform data transfers.

commands.name: waveform_count_query
commands.description: Returns the count of averages or values for the current waveform.

commands.name: waveform_data_query
commands.description: Returns the waveform data as an IEEE 488.2 definite-length binary block.

commands.name: waveform_format
commands.description: Sets/queries the data transmission format for waveform data.

commands.name: waveform_points
commands.description: Sets/queries the number of waveform points returned by :WAVeform:DATA?.

commands.name: waveform_preamble_query
commands.description: Returns the waveform preamble: format, type, points, count, and X/Y increment/origin/reference values.

parameters.name: preamble_block
parameters.range: <format NR1>,<type NR1>,<points NR1>,<count NR1>,<xincrement NR3>,<xorigin NR3>,<xreference NR1>,<yincrement NR3>,<yorigin NR3>,<yreference NR1>

commands.name: waveform_source
commands.description: Sets/queries the source for waveform data queries.

commands.name: waveform_type_query
commands.description: Returns the acquisition mode of the current waveform.

commands.name: waveform_unsigned
commands.description: Sets/queries whether waveform data is returned as unsigned (1) or signed (0) values.

commands.name: waveform_view
commands.description: Sets/queries the waveform view returned.

commands.name: waveform_x_increment_query
commands.description: Returns the x-increment (time between data points) from the current preamble.

commands.name: waveform_x_origin_query
commands.description: Returns the x-origin (time of the first data point) from the current preamble.

commands.name: waveform_x_reference_query
commands.description: Returns the x-reference (data point index of x-origin) from the current preamble.

commands.name: waveform_y_increment_query
commands.description: Returns the y-increment (voltage per code level) from the current preamble.

commands.name: waveform_y_origin_query
commands.description: Returns the y-origin (voltage at y-reference) from the current preamble.

commands.name: waveform_y_reference_query
commands.description: Returns the y-reference (code value of y-origin) from the current preamble.
